responses: Hello! How can I help you today?
Hi there! What can I help you with?
Our support team is available Monday to Friday, 9 AM to 6 PM.
You can track your order from the Orders page in your account or with the shipping link sent by email.
Refunds are processed to the original payment method within 5 to 7 business days after approval.
You can reset your password from the login page by selecting 'Forgot password'.
You can contact support at support@example.com or request a callback in your account portal.
